title: sagraea polystachya
intro: Sagraea polystachya, also known as the "Polystachya orchid", is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
